description.value:
War-names spoken over stone and fire — in Jötuntunga culture, a war-name is given at the moment of greatest crisis and becomes part of the weapon forever; a blade that has been named strikes with certainty the one time that matters most.

Effect: Once per respite, your next strike with this weapon automatically scores a critical hit (regardless of the roll result).

Rules: Critical Hit; Strike; Respite.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of exceptional quality; a war-name ceremony conducted in Jötuntunga before a witness
project.source: War-names spoken over stone and fire (Jötuntunga)
